test.name: Extract assertions from Louise Becker's 1941 Vine Street Hill burial index entry
test.description: Vine Street Hill Cemetery (Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio) burial index entry for Louise Becker, buried 4 Feb 1941 (ark:/61903/1:1:CRY7-D9T2). Real record from the Ferber/Becker research (#799). Names her parents John Becker and Mary Kramer - part of the Anna/Mary Kramer name conflict. Tests that a deceased person's parents named on a burial record are indirect.

input.user_message:
Extract assertions from this cemetery burial index entry:

Ohio, Hamilton, Cincinnati, Vine Street Hill Cemetery Index of Burials, 1851-1986
FamilySearch ark:/61903/1:1:CRY7-D9T2

Name: Louise Becker
Death date: 2 February 1941
Burial date: 4 February 1941
Cemetery: Vine Street Hill Cemetery, Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio
Father: John Becker
Mother: Mary Kramer

judge_context: Death date (2 Feb 1941) and burial date (4 Feb 1941) are DIRECT evidence - recorded at/near the burial event

Louise's parents (John Becker and Mary Kramer) are INDIRECT evidence: they are named on Louise's own burial record by an informant relaying secondhand knowledge, not witnessed - the same death-record doctrine used for a decedent's parents (see ut_record_extraction_009). Do NOT mark the parent names/relationships direct

Extract the mother's name exactly as stated ('Mary Kramer'); do NOT reconcile it with the 'Anna Kramer' on Frank's marriage or the 'Anna' on John's burial - that conflict is resolved downstream, not at extraction
Source classification is DERIVATIVE - an index of the cemetery's burial records
Informant is unknown on this index entry; information quality is indeterminate (secondary for the parentage facts)
Burial place is Vine Street Hill Cemetery, Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio
